song.title: Jesus, Lover of My Soul
song.lyrics: [V1] .G D Jesus, lover of my soul, .Em C Jesus, I will never let You go. .G D You've taken me from the miry clay, .Em C Set my feet upon the rock and now I know. .G D Em I love You, I need You, though my world may fall, .C I'll never let You go. .G D My Savior, my closest Friend, .Em C G I will worship You until the very end.
